message:
chore(node): expand gitignore and rchignore patterns for ephemeral agent artifacts

Extend all three ignore files to cover ephemeral files that accumulate
from concurrent agent activity, remote compilation, and debugging:

- .beads/.gitignore: Add beads.db.bad_*, beads.db.rebuild_* (corrupt
  DB snapshots from recovery), and recovery_*/ (recovery staging dirs).

- .gitignore: Add .rch-target-*/ (remote compilation target dirs that
  use dash-separated naming), .beads/*.bad_*, .beads/*.rebuild_*,
  .beads/recovery_*/ (beads recovery artifacts), /ubs-report.txt and
  other UBS output variants, test scratch files (test_borrow,
  test_bypass, test_epoch_downgrade), ephemeral outputs (patch.diff,
  unwrap_list.txt, clippy.txt, /1), and storage.sqlite3.bak* backups.

- .rchignore: Mirror the new .gitignore patterns so remote compilation
  helper excludes the same files from transfer, preventing unnecessary
  network traffic for ephemeral artifacts.

These patterns prevent untracked ephemeral files from cluttering
git status across multi-agent development sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,16 +32,21 @@ __pycache__/
 
 # Beads issue tracker history backups
 .beads/.br_history/
+.beads/*.bad_*
+.beads/*.rebuild_*
+.beads/recovery_*/
 
 # Agent coordination config
 .agent-mail.yaml
 
 # Remote compilation helper temp directories
 .rch_tmp/
 .rch_*/
+/.rch-target-*/
 
 # UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) output
 ubs.json
+/ubs-*.txt
 ubs_*.txt
 ubs_*.json
 ubs_*.sarif
@@ -57,6 +62,10 @@ final_ubs*.txt
 text_ubs_output.txt
 clippy_out.txt
 fixer.txt
+/ubs-report.txt
+/ubs-runtime.txt
+/ubs-runtime-control.txt
+/ubs-control-plane.txt
 
 # Debug/scratch audience token output
 audience_token*.json
@@ -74,16 +83,25 @@ test_remaining.py
 /test.rs
 /test_chrono.rs
 /test_panic.rs
+/test_borrow
+/test_borrow.rs
+/test_bypass.rs
+/test_epoch_downgrade.rs
 
 # Ephemeral output files
 /out.json
 /reproduction_report.json
+/patch.diff
+/unwrap_list.txt
+/clippy.txt
+/1
 
 # Runtime SQLite databases
 storage.sqlite3
 *.sqlite3-wal
 *.sqlite3-shm
 *.sqlite3-journal
+/storage.sqlite3.bak*
 
 # Agent-generated analysis scripts
 find_commands.py
